en.name: Uta
en.effectText: [DON!! x1] [When Attacking] [Once Per Turn] Reveal 1 card from the top of your deck and add up to 1 {FILM} type card to your hand. Then, place the rest at the bottom of your deck.

jp.name: ウタ
jp.effectText: 【ドン!!×1】【アタック時】【ターン1回】自分のデッキの上から1枚を公開し、特徴《FILM》を持つカード1枚までを、手札に加える。その後、残りをデッキの下に置く。

definition.name: Uta
definition.text: [DON!! x1] [When Attacking] [Once Per Turn] Reveal 1 card from the top of your deck and add up to 1 {FILM} type card to your hand. Then, place the rest at the bottom of your deck.

en.name: Uta
en.effectText: [Blocker] (After your opponent declares an attack, you may rest this card to make it the new target of the attack.)[End of Your Turn] You may trash 1 Event from your hand: Set up to 1 of your {FILM} type Characters as active.

jp.name: ウタ
jp.effectText: 【ブロッカー】(相手のアタックの後、このカードをレストにし、アタックの対象をこのカードにできる)【自分のターン終了時】自分の手札からイベント1枚を捨てることができる：自分の特徴《FILM》を持つキャラ1枚までを、アクティブにする。

definition.name: Uta
definition.text: [Blocker] (After your opponent declares an attack, you may rest this card to make it the new target of the attack.)[End of Your Turn] You may trash 1 Event from your hand: Set up to 1 of your {FILM} type Characters as active.

en.name: Backlight
en.effectText: [Main] If your Leader is [Uta], choose one:• Rest up to 1 of your opponent's Characters with a cost of 5 or less.• K.O. up to 1 of your opponent's rested Characters with a cost of 5 or less.

jp.name: 逆光
jp.effectText: 【メイン】自分のリーダーが「ウタ」の場合、以下から1つを選ぶ。・相手のコスト5以下のキャラ1枚までを、レストにする。・相手のレストのコスト5以下のキャラ1枚までを、KOする。

definition.name: Backlight
definition.text: [Main] If your Leader is [Uta], choose one:• Rest up to 1 of your opponent's Characters with a cost of 5 or less.• K.O. up to 1 of your opponent's rested Characters with a cost of 5 or less.

en.name: New Genesis
en.effectText: [Main] If your Leader is [Uta], look at 3 cards from the top of your deck; reveal up to 1 {FILM} type card other than [New Genesis] and add it to your hand. Then, place the rest at the bottom of your deck in any order and set up to 1 of your DON!! cards as active.

jp.name: 新時代
jp.effectText: 【メイン】自分のリーダーが「ウタ」の場合、自分のデッキの上から3枚を見て、「新時代」以外の特徴《FILM》を持つカード1枚までを公開し、手札に加える。その後、残りを好きな順番でデッキの下に置き、自分のドン!!1枚までを、アクティブにする。

definition.name: New Genesis
definition.text: [Main] If your Leader is [Uta], look at 3 cards from the top of your deck; reveal up to 1 {FILM} type card other than [New Genesis] and add it to your hand. Then, place the rest at the bottom of your deck in any order and set up to 1 of your DON!! cards as active.

en.name: I'm invincible
en.effectText: [Main] Set up to 1 of your [Uta] Leader as active. [Trigger] Up to 1 of your Leader or Character cards gains +1000 power during this turn.

jp.name: 私は最強
jp.effectText: 【メイン】自分のリーダーの「ウタ」1枚までを、アクティブにする。 【トリガー】自分のリーダーかキャラ1枚までを、このターン中、パワー+1000。

definition.name: I'm invincible
definition.text: [Main] Set up to 1 of your [Uta] Leader as active. [Trigger] Up to 1 of your Leader or Character cards gains +1000 power during this turn.
